untranslatable_reason: Tick direction detection (uptick/downtick/zero-tick classification) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal requires real-time tick classification and dynamic limit price adjustment logic that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV-derived indicators. Tick type (non_uptick, non_downtick) and continuous limit price adjustment mechanics are order execution features, not price-based conditions.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about tick-sensitive order execution mechanics rather than price-level entry/exit conditions. The allowed indicators are based on OHLCV data and do not include tick-level direction information needed to implement the core rule. A proper implementation would require a custom tick data feed and order execution module outside the backtest engine's standard indicator framework.
